---
title: "Health Canada Regulatory Submission Support"
---

## Expert Support for Health Canada Regulatory Submissions

Preparing a strong Health Canada submission can be complex, time-sensitive, and critical to trial activation. The ACT-CTU offers access to specialized regulatory support to help investigators navigate submission requirements with greater confidence and efficiency.

Through this service, investigators may request a consultation with **Lori Anderson**, an experienced regulatory consultant with expertise in Health Canada submissions.

---

## What This Service Offers

This service is designed to support investigators who require guidance with Health Canada regulatory processes for clinical trials.

Support may include:

- Guidance on Health Canada submission requirements  
- Review of submission strategy and documentation  
- Advice on preparing and organizing regulatory packages  
- Input on common challenges and areas requiring clarification  
- Support to strengthen readiness prior to submission  

This service is intended to help investigators reduce avoidable delays and improve the quality and completeness of their submission package.

---

## Consultant

**Lori Anderson**  
Regulatory Consultant  
Expertise: Health Canada clinical trial submissions

---

## Fees

Consultations are available at a rate of **$100 CAD per hour**.

Please note:

- Fees are **the responsibility of the Principal Investigator**
- Consultation time and scope can be tailored to project needs

---

## Request a Consultation

Investigators interested in this service are invited to contact the ACT-CTU to request a consultation.

📧 **[Request a Health Canada Submission Consultation](mailto:amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca?subject=Health%20Canada%20Submission%20Consultation%20Request)**

---

## What to Include in Your Request

To help us triage your request efficiently, please include:

- Principal Investigator name  
- Project title  
- Brief description of the study  
- Type of support requested  
- Relevant timelines or submission deadline  
- Any specific questions or challenges you would like to address  

---

## Why This Matters

Health Canada submissions are a critical component of trial start-up. Early expert input can help investigators:

- Clarify submission requirements  
- Strengthen submission quality  
- Anticipate regulatory questions  
- Improve efficiency and reduce delays  

The ACT-CTU is committed to helping investigators access the expertise needed to advance high-quality clinical trials at the RI-MUHC.

---

## Get Started

If you would like to explore whether this service is appropriate for your study, please reach out:

📧 **[Contact us to request a consultation](mailto:amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca?subject=Health%20Canada%20Submission%20Consultation%20Request)**
